texts.1:28:15-15: And behold, I am with thee, and will keep thee in all [places] to which thou goest, and will bring thee again into this land; for I will not leave thee until I have done what I have spoken to thee of.
texts.1:50:20-20: Ye indeed meant evil against me: God meant it for good, in order that he might do as [it is] this day, to save a great people alive.
texts.10:22:29-29: For thou art my lamp, Jehovah; And Jehovah enlighteneth my darkness.
texts.10:22:31-31: As for God, his way is perfect; The word of Jehovah is tried: He is a shield to all that trust in him.
texts.13:16:11-11: Seek Jehovah and his strength, Seek his face continually;
texts.13:16:34-34: Give thanks unto Jehovah, for he is good; For his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.
texts.14:15:7-7: But as for you, be firm and let not your hands be weak; for there is a reward for your deeds.
texts.16:8:10-10: And he said to them, Go your way, eat the fat, and drink the sweet, and send portions to them for whom nothing is prepared; for the day is holy to our Lord; and be not grieved, for the joy of Jehovah is your strength.
texts.17:4:14-14: For if thou altogether holdest thy peace at this time, then shall there arise relief and deliverance to the Jews from another place; but thou and thy father's house shall perish. And who knows whether thou art [not] come to the kingdom for such a time as this?
texts.18:19:25-25: And [as for] me, I know that my Redeemer liveth, and the Last, he shall stand upon the earth;
texts.18:23:10-10: But he knoweth the way that I take; he trieth me, I shall come forth as gold.
texts.18:42:2-2: I know that thou canst do everything, and that thou canst be hindered in no thought of thine.
texts.18:8:21-21: Whilst he would fill thy mouth with laughing and thy lips with shouting,
texts.19:1:1-2: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the wicked, and standeth not in the way of sinners, and sitteth not in the seat of scorners; But his delight is in Jehovah's law, and in his law doth he meditate day and night.
texts.19:100:4-5: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving [and] into his courts with praise; give thanks unto him, bless his name: For Jehovah is good; his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever; and his faithfulness from generation to generation.
texts.19:103:1-2: Bless Jehovah, O my soul; and all that is within me, [bless] his holy name! Bless Jehovah, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits:
texts.19:103:11-12: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his loving-kindness toward them that fear him. As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
texts.19:103:13-13: As a father pitieth [his] children, so Jehovah pitieth them that fear him.
texts.19:103:8-8: Jehovah is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in loving-kindness.
texts.19:104:33-34: I will sing unto Jehovah as long as I live; I will sing psalms to my God while I have my being. My meditation shall be pleasant unto him; I will rejoice in Jehovah.
texts.19:105:1-2: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah, call upon his name; make known his acts among the peoples. Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him; meditate upon all his wondrous works.
texts.19:107:1-1: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.
texts.19:107:8-9: Let them give thanks unto Jehovah for his loving-kindness, and for his wondrous works to the children of men; For he hath satisfied the longing soul and filled the hungry soul with good.
texts.19:108:3-4: I will give thee thanks among the peoples, O Jehovah; of thee will I sing psalms among the nations: For thy loving-kindness is great above the heavens, and thy truth is unto the clouds.
texts.19:111:1-2: Hallelujah! I will celebrate Jehovah with [my] whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the assembly. Great are the works of Jehovah; sought out of all that delight in them.
texts.19:112:4-4: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness; he is gracious, and merciful, and righteous.
texts.19:112:7-7: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings; his heart is fixed confiding in Jehovah;
texts.19:113:3-3: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same, let Jehovah's name be praised.
texts.19:115:11-11: Ye that fear Jehovah, confide in Jehovah: he is their help and their shield.
texts.19:116:1-2: I love Jehovah, for he hath heard my voice [and] my supplications; For he hath inclined his ear unto me, and I will call upon him during [all] my days.
texts.19:116:7-7: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for Jehovah hath dealt bountifully with thee.
texts.19:118:1-1: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.
texts.19:118:14-14: My strength and song is Jah, and he is become my salvation.
texts.19:118:24-24: This is the day that Jehovah hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
texts.19:118:6-6: Jehovah is for me, I will not fear; what can man do unto me?
texts.19:119:105-105: NUN. Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.
texts.19:119:11-11: Thy word have I hid in my heart, that I might not sin against thee.
texts.19:119:114-114: Thou art my hiding-place and my shield: I hope in thy word.
texts.19:119:165-165: Great peace have they that love thy law, and nothing doth stumble them.
texts.19:119:50-50: This is my comfort in mine affliction; for thy word hath quickened me.
texts.19:119:76-76: Oh let thy loving-kindness be for my comfort, according to thy word unto thy servant.
texts.19:119:9-10: BETH. Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his path? by taking heed according to thy word. With my whole heart have I sought thee: let me not wander from thy commandments.
texts.19:121:1-2: I lift up mine eyes unto the mountains: whence shall my help come? My help [cometh] from Jehovah, who made the heavens and the earth.
texts.19:121:7-8: Jehovah will keep thee from all evil; he will keep thy soul. Jehovah will keep thy going out and thy coming in, from henceforth and for evermore.
texts.19:124:8-8: Our help is in the name of Jehovah, the maker of heavens and earth.
texts.19:125:1-2: They that confide in Jehovah are as mount Zion, which cannot be moved; it abideth for ever. Jerusalem! mountains are round about her, and Jehovah is round about his people, from henceforth and for evermore.
texts.19:126:3-3: Jehovah hath done great things for us; [and] we are joyful.
texts.19:126:5-6: They that sow in tears shall reap with rejoicing: He goeth forth and weepeth, bearing seed for scattering; he cometh again with rejoicing, bearing his sheaves.
texts.19:127:1-2: Unless Jehovah build the house, in vain do its builders labour in it; unless Jehovah keep the city, the keeper watcheth in vain: It is vain for you to rise up early, to lie down late, to eat the bread of sorrows: so to his beloved one he giveth sleep.
texts.19:128:1-2: Blessed is every one that feareth Jehovah, that walketh in his ways. For thou shalt eat the labour of thy hands; happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.
texts.19:13:5-6: As for me, I have confided in thy loving-kindness; my heart shall be joyful in thy salvation. I will sing unto Jehovah, for he hath dealt bountifully with me.
texts.19:130:5-5: I wait for Jehovah; my soul doth wait, and in his word do I hope.
texts.19:130:7-7: Let Israel hope in Jehovah, because with Jehovah there is loving-kindness, and with him is plenteous redemption;
texts.19:131:2-2: Surely I have restrained and composed my soul, like a weaned child with its mother: my soul within me is as a weaned child.
texts.19:133:1-1: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!
texts.19:134:1-2: Behold, bless Jehovah, all ye servants of Jehovah, who by night stand in the house of Jehovah. Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless Jehovah.
texts.19:135:3-3: Praise ye Jah; for Jehovah is good: sing psalms unto his name; for it is pleasant.
texts.19:136:1-1: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah, for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever:
texts.19:138:3-3: In the day when I called thou answeredst me; thou didst encourage me with strength in my soul.
texts.19:138:8-8: Jehovah will perfect what concerneth me: thy loving-kindness, O Jehovah, [endureth] for ever; forsake not the works of thine own hands.
texts.19:139:14-14: I will praise thee, for I am fearfully, wonderfully made. Marvellous are thy works; and [that] my soul knoweth right well.
texts.19:139:23-24: Search me, O God, and know my heart; prove me, and know my thoughts; And see if there be any grievous way in me; and lead me in the way everlasting.
texts.19:139:9-10: [If] I take the wings of the dawn [and] dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea, Even there shall thy hand lead me, and thy right hand shall hold me.
texts.19:141:3-3: Set a watch, O Jehovah, before my mouth; keep the door of my lips.
texts.19:143:10-10: Teach me to do thy will; for thou art my God: let thy good Spirit lead me in a plain country.
texts.19:143:8-8: Cause me to hear thy loving-kindness in the morning, for in thee do I confide; make me to know the way wherein I should walk, for unto thee do I lift up my soul.
texts.19:145:18-19: Jehovah is nigh unto all that call upon him, unto all that call upon him in truth. He fulfilleth the desire of them that fear him; he heareth their cry, and saveth them.
texts.19:145:3-3: Great is Jehovah, and exceedingly to be praised; and his greatness is unsearchable.
texts.19:145:8-9: Jehovah is gracious and merciful; slow to anger, and of great loving-kindness. Jehovah is good to all; and his tender mercies are over all his works.
texts.19:146:1-2: Hallelujah! Praise Jehovah, O my soul. As long as I live will I praise Jehovah; I will sing psalms unto my God while I have my being.
texts.19:146:5-5: Blessed is he who hath the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in Jehovah his God,
texts.19:147:11-11: Jehovah taketh pleasure in those that fear him, in those that hope in his loving-kindness.
texts.19:147:3-3: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.
texts.19:147:4-5: He counteth the number of the stars; he giveth names to them all. Great is our Lord, and of great power: his understanding is infinite.
texts.19:150:6-6: Let everything that hath breath praise Jah. Hallelujah!
texts.19:16:11-11: Thou wilt make known to me the path of life: thy countenance is fulness of joy; at thy right hand are pleasures for evermore.
texts.19:16:8-8: I have set Jehovah continually before me; because [he is] at my right hand, I shall not be moved.
texts.19:17:8-8: Keep me as the apple of the eye, hide me under the shadow of thy wings,
texts.19:18:2-2: Jehovah is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I will trust; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.
texts.19:19:1-1: The heavens declare the glory of God; and the expanse sheweth the work of his hands.
texts.19:19:14-14: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in thy sight, O Jehovah, my rock, and my redeemer.
texts.19:20:7-7: Some make mention of chariots, and some of horses, but we of the name of Jehovah our God.
texts.19:23:1-3: Jehovah is my shepherd; I shall not want. He maketh me to lie down in green pastures; he leadeth me beside still waters. He restoreth my soul; he leadeth me in paths of righteousness for his name's sake.
texts.19:23:4-4: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff, they comfort me.
texts.19:24:1-1: The earth is Jehovah's, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.
texts.19:25:4-5: Make me to know thy ways, O Jehovah; teach me thy paths. Make me to walk in thy truth, and teach me: for thou art the God of my salvation; on thee do I wait all the day.
texts.19:25:8-9: Good and upright is Jehovah; therefore will he instruct sinners in the way: The meek will he guide in judgment, and the meek will he teach his way.
texts.19:27:1-1: Jehovah is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? Jehovah is the strength of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?
texts.19:27:14-14: Wait for Jehovah; be strong and let thy heart take courage: yea, wait for Jehovah.
texts.19:27:4-4: One [thing] have I asked of Jehovah, that will I seek after: that I may dwell in the house of Jehovah all the days of my life, to behold the beauty of Jehovah, and to inquire [of him] in his temple.
texts.19:28:7-7: Jehovah is my strength and my shield; my heart confided in him, and I was helped: therefore my heart exulteth, and with my song will I praise him.
texts.19:29:11-11: Jehovah will give strength unto his people; Jehovah will bless his people with peace.
texts.19:3:3-3: But thou, Jehovah, art a shield about me; my glory, and the lifter up of my head.
texts.19:30:11-12: Thou hast turned for me my mourning into dancing; thou hast loosed my sackcloth, and girded me with gladness; That [my] glory may sing psalms of thee, and not be silent. Jehovah my God, I will praise thee for ever.
texts.19:30:5-5: For a moment [is passed] in his anger, a life in his favour; at even weeping cometh for the night, and at morn there is rejoicing.
texts.19:31:14-15: But I confided in thee, Jehovah; I said, thou art my God. My times are in thy hand: deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from my persecutors.
texts.19:31:19-19: [Oh] how great is thy goodness, which thou hast laid up for them that fear thee, [which] thou hast wrought for them that trust in thee, before the sons of men!
texts.19:31:24-24: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all ye that hope in Jehovah.
texts.19:32:7-7: Thou art a hiding-place for me; thou preservest me from trouble; thou dost encompass me with songs of deliverance. Selah.
texts.19:32:8-8: I will instruct thee and teach thee the way in which thou shalt go; I will counsel [thee] with mine eye upon thee.
texts.19:33:20-21: Our soul waiteth for Jehovah: he is our help and our shield. For in him shall our heart rejoice, because we have confided in his holy name.
texts.19:33:22-22: Let thy loving-kindness, O Jehovah, be upon us, according as we have hoped in thee.
texts.19:33:4-4: For the word of Jehovah is right, and all his work is in faithfulness.
texts.19:34:1-1: I will bless Jehovah at all times; his praise shall continually be in my mouth.
texts.19:34:14-14: Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.
texts.19:34:18-18: Jehovah is nigh to those that are of a broken heart, and saveth them that are of a contrite spirit.
texts.19:34:4-5: I sought Jehovah, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears. They looked unto him, and were enlightened, and their faces were not confounded.
texts.19:34:8-8: Taste and see that Jehovah is good: blessed is the man that trusteth in him!
texts.19:36:5-5: Jehovah, thy loving-kindness is in the heavens, and thy faithfulness [reacheth] unto the clouds.
texts.19:36:7-9: How precious is thy loving-kindness, O God! So the sons of men take refuge under the shadow of thy wings. They shall be abundantly satisfied with the fatness of thy house; and thou wilt make them drink of the river of thy pleasures. For with thee is the fountain of life: in thy light shall we see light.
texts.19:37:23-24: The steps of a man are established by Jehovah, and he delighteth in his way: though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down, for Jehovah upholdeth his hand.
texts.19:37:4-4: and delight thyself in Jehovah, and he will give thee the desires of thy heart.
texts.19:37:5-6: Commit thy way unto Jehovah, and rely upon him: he will bring [it] to pass; and he will bring forth thy righteousness as the light, and thy judgment as the noonday.
texts.19:39:7-7: And now, what wait I for, Lord? my hope is in thee.
texts.19:4:8-8: In peace will I both lay me down and sleep; for thou, Jehovah, alone makest me to dwell in safety.
texts.19:40:1-3: I waited patiently for Jehovah; and he inclined unto me, and heard my cry. And he brought me up out of the pit of destruction, out of the miry clay, and set my feet upon a rock; he hath established my goings: And he hath put a new song in my mouth, praise unto our God. Many shall see it, and fear, and shall confide in Jehovah.
texts.19:40:5-5: Thou, O Jehovah my God, hast multiplied thy marvellous works, and thy thoughts toward us: they cannot be reckoned up in order unto thee; would I declare and speak [them], they are more than can be numbered.
texts.19:42:1-2: As the hart panteth after the water-brooks, so panteth my soul after thee, O God. My soul thirsteth for God, for the living God: when shall I come and appear before God?
texts.19:42:11-11: Why art thou cast down, my soul? and why art thou disquieted within me? hope in God; for I shall yet praise him, [who is] the health of my countenance, and my God.
texts.19:46:1-2: God is our refuge and strength, a help in distresses, very readily found. Therefore will we not fear though the earth be removed, and though the mountains be carried into the heart of the seas;
texts.19:46:10-10: Be still, and know that I am God: I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.
texts.19:48:14-14: For this God is our God for ever and ever; he will be our guide until death.
texts.19:5:3-3: Jehovah, in the morning shalt thou hear my voice; in the morning will I address myself to thee, and will look up.
texts.19:50:15-15: And call upon me in the day of trouble; I will deliver thee, and thou shalt glorify me.
texts.19:51:10-10: Create in me a clean heart, O God, and renew a steadfast spirit within me.
texts.19:54:4-4: Behold, God is my helper; the Lord is among them that uphold my soul.
texts.19:55:22-22: Cast thy burden upon Jehovah, and *he* will sustain thee: he will never suffer the righteous to be moved.
texts.19:56:3-4: In the day that I am afraid, I will confide in thee. In God will I praise his word, in God I put my confidence: I will not fear; what can flesh do unto me?
texts.19:57:9-10: I will give thee thanks among the peoples, O Lord; of thee will I sing psalms among the nations: For thy loving-kindness is great unto the heavens, and thy truth unto the clouds.
texts.19:59:16-16: But as for me, I will sing of thy strength; yea, I will sing aloud of thy loving-kindness in the morning; for thou hast been to me a high fortress, and a refuge in the day of my trouble.
texts.19:61:2-3: From the end of the earth will I call unto thee, when my heart is overwhelmed: thou wilt lead me on to a rock which is too high for me. For thou hast been a refuge for me, a strong tower from before the enemy.
texts.19:62:1-2: Upon God alone doth my soul rest peacefully; from him is my salvation. He only is my rock and my salvation; my high fortress: I shall not be greatly moved.
texts.19:62:5-6: Upon God alone, O my soul, rest peacefully; for my expectation is from him. He only is my rock and my salvation; my high fortress: I shall not be moved.
texts.19:62:8-8: Confide in him at all times, ye people; pour out your heart before him: God is our refuge. Selah.
texts.19:63:3-4: For thy loving-kindness is better than life: my lips shall praise thee. So will I bless thee while I live; I will lift up my hands in thy name.
texts.19:63:7-8: For thou hast been my help, and in the shadow of thy wings will I sing for joy. My soul followeth hard after thee: thy right hand upholdeth me.
texts.19:65:11-11: Thou crownest the year with thy goodness, and thy paths drop fatness:
texts.19:66:1-2: Shout aloud unto God, all the earth: Sing forth the glory of his name, make his praise glorious;
texts.19:67:1-2: God be gracious unto us, and bless us, [and] cause his face to shine upon us; Selah, That thy way may be known upon earth, thy salvation among all nations.
texts.19:68:19-19: Blessed be the Lord: day by day doth he load us [with good], the God who is our salvation. Selah.
texts.19:71:14-14: But as for me, I will hope continually, and will praise thee yet more and more.
texts.19:71:5-5: For thou art my hope, O Lord Jehovah, my confidence from my youth.
texts.19:73:23-24: Nevertheless I am continually with thee: thou hast holden my right hand; Thou wilt guide me by thy counsel, and after the glory, thou wilt receive me.
texts.19:73:26-26: My flesh and my heart faileth: God is the rock of my heart and my portion for ever.
texts.19:77:11-12: Will I remember, the works of Jah; for I will remember thy wonders of old, And I will meditate upon all thy work, and muse upon thy doings.
texts.19:8:3-4: When I see thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, the moon and stars, which thou hast established; What is man, that thou art mindful of him? and the son of man, that thou visitest him?
texts.19:84:11-11: For Jehovah Elohim is a sun and shield: Jehovah will give grace and glory; no good thing will he withhold from them that walk uprightly.
texts.19:85:8-8: I will hear what God, Jehovah, will speak; for he will speak peace unto his people, and to his godly ones: but let them not turn again to folly.
texts.19:86:15-15: But thou, Lord, art a God merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in goodness and truth.
texts.19:86:5-5: For thou, Lord, art good, and ready to forgive, and art of great loving-kindness unto all that call upon thee.
texts.19:89:1-1: I will sing of the loving-kindness of Jehovah for ever; with my mouth will I make known thy faithfulness from generation to generation.
texts.19:9:1-1: I will praise Jehovah with my whole heart; I will recount all thy marvellous works.
texts.19:9:9-10: And Jehovah will be a refuge to the oppressed one, a refuge in times of distress. And they that know thy name will confide in thee; for thou, Jehovah, hast not forsaken them that seek thee.
texts.19:90:12-12: So teach [us] to number our days, that we may acquire a wise heart.
texts.19:90:14-14: Satisfy us early with thy loving-kindness; that we may sing for joy and be glad all our days.
texts.19:90:17-17: And let the beauty of Jehovah our God be upon us; and establish thou the work of our hands upon us: yea, the work of our hands, establish thou it.
texts.19:91:1-2: He that dwelleth in the secret place of the Most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty. I say of Jehovah, My refuge and my fortress; my God, I will confide in him.
texts.19:91:11-11: For he shall give his angels charge concerning thee, to keep thee in all thy ways:
texts.19:91:4-4: He shall cover thee with his feathers, and under his wings shalt thou find refuge: his truth is a shield and buckler.
texts.19:92:1-2: It is good to give thanks unto Jehovah, and to sing psalms unto thy name, O Most High; To declare thy loving-kindness in the morning, and thy faithfulness in the nights,
texts.19:94:19-19: In the multitude of my anxious thoughts within me thy comforts have delighted my soul.
texts.19:95:1-2: Come, let us sing aloud to Jehovah, let us shout for joy to the rock of our salvation; Let us come before his face with thanksgiving; let us shout aloud unto him with psalms.
texts.19:96:1-2: Sing ye unto Jehovah a new song: sing unto Jehovah, all the earth. Sing unto Jehovah, bless his name; publish his salvation from day to day.
texts.19:97:11-11: Light is sown for the righteous, and joy for the upright in heart.
texts.19:98:1-1: Sing ye unto Jehovah a new song: for he hath done wondrous things; his right hand and his holy arm hath wrought salvation for him.
texts.2:14:14-14: Jehovah will fight for you, and ye shall be still.
texts.2:15:2-2: My strength and song is Jah, and he is become my salvation: This is my God, and I will glorify him; My father's God, and I will extol him.
texts.2:33:14-14: And he said, My presence shall go, and I will give thee rest.
texts.20:1:7-7: The fear of Jehovah is the beginning of knowledge: fools despise wisdom and instruction.
texts.20:10:12-12: Hatred stirreth up strifes; but love covereth all transgressions.
texts.20:10:22-22: The blessing of Jehovah, it maketh rich, and he addeth no sorrow to it.
texts.20:10:9-9: He that walketh in integrity walketh securely; but he that perverteth his ways shall be known.
texts.20:11:2-2: [When] pride cometh, then cometh shame; but with the lowly is wisdom.
texts.20:11:25-25: The liberal soul shall be made fat, and he that watereth shall be watered also himself.
texts.20:12:18-18: There is that babbleth like the piercings of a sword; but the tongue of the wise is health.
texts.20:12:25-25: Heaviness in the heart of man maketh it stoop; but a good word maketh it glad.
texts.20:13:12-12: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick; but the desire [that] cometh to pass is a tree of life.
texts.20:13:20-20: He that walketh with wise [men] becometh wise; but a companion of the foolish will be depraved.
texts.20:14:26-26: In the fear of Jehovah is strong confidence, and his children shall have a place of refuge.
texts.20:14:29-29: He that is slow to anger is of great understanding; but he that is hasty of spirit exalteth folly.
texts.20:14:30-30: A sound heart is the life of the flesh; but envy the rottenness of the bones.
texts.20:15:1-1: A soft answer turneth away fury; but a grievous word stirreth up anger.
texts.20:15:13-13: A joyful heart maketh a cheerful countenance; but by sorrow of heart the spirit is broken.
texts.20:15:23-23: A man hath joy by the answer of his mouth; and a word in its season, how good is it!
texts.20:15:30-30: That which enlighteneth the eyes rejoiceth the heart; good tidings make the bones fat.
texts.20:16:20-20: He that giveth heed to the word shall find good; and whoso confideth in Jehovah, happy is he.

texts.66:1:8-8: I am the Alpha and the Omega, saith [the] Lord God, he who is, and who was, and who is to come, the Almighty.
texts.66:21:4-4: And he shall wipe away every tear from their eyes; and death shall not exist any more, nor grief, nor cry, nor distress shall exist any more, for the former things have passed away.
texts.66:21:5-5: And he that sat on the throne said, Behold, I make all things new. And he says [to me], Write, for these words are true and faithful.
texts.66:22:5-5: And night shall not be any more, and no need of a lamp, and light of [the] sun; for [the] Lord God shall shine upon them, and they shall reign to the ages of ages.
texts.66:3:20-20: Behold, I stand at the door and am knocking; if any one hear my voice and open the door, I will come in unto him and sup with him, and he with me.
texts.8:1:16-16: And Ruth said, Do not intreat me to leave thee, to return from [following] after thee; for whither thou goest I will go, and where thou lodgest I will lodge: thy people shall be my people, and thy God my God;
texts.9:12:24-24: Only, fear Jehovah, and serve him in truth, with all your heart; for see how great things he has done for you.
texts.9:16:7-7: But Jehovah said to Samuel, Look not on his countenance, or on the height of his stature; because I have rejected him; for it is not as man seeth; for man looketh upon the outward appearance, but Jehovah looketh upon the heart.
texts.9:2:2-2: There is none holy as Jehovah, for there is none beside thee, neither is there any rock like our God.
